name: CymatiStatic-pi-pager
description: pi-pager: cross-channel pager for agentic AI workflows. Sound + Windows toast + phone/watch (ntfy) + Discord/Slack/Telegram/Pushover. Auto-tags by git repo, multi-instance routing.
